children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, and return success or error
semantic_inputs: input: Any - JSON with registration details (name, contact, etc.)
semantic_outputs: output: Any - JSON with success status, patient ID, and message
postconditions: new patient record created in patients data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with registration details (name, contact, etc.)

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details from input, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, and return confirmation
semantic_inputs: input: Any - JSON with patient ID, date, time, doctor, etc.
semantic_outputs: output: Any - JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message
postconditions: new appointment record created in appointments data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID, date, time, doctor, etc.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check slot availability and store appointment

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID from input, verify patient exists, query appointments data store for all records, and return them
semantic_inputs: input: Any - JSON with patient ID
semantic_outputs: output: Any - JSON with success status, list of records, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Query all records for the patient

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, list of records, and message

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields from input, verify patient exists, update patients data store, and return confirmation
semantic_inputs: input: Any - JSON with patient ID and fields to update
semantic_outputs: output: Any - JSON with success status and message
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and fields to update

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and update profile

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and message

children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Parse the input JSON to determine which command to execute
children.behavior: Extract the 'command' field from input JSON and return it along with the rest of the data
semantic_inputs: input: Any - JSON with command field
guarantees: command is one of the valid commands

outputs.name: data
outputs.description: Remaining JSON data for the command

children.name: ValidateInput
children.purpose: Validate the input JSON structure and required fields
children.behavior: Check that input has required fields based on command, return validation result
semantic_inputs: input: Any - JSON with command and data
semantic_outputs: validation_result: bool - True if valid, False otherwise
error_message: str - Error description if invalid

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Format the output JSON with success, data, and message
children.behavior: Take the result from a child operation and wrap it in a standard response format
semantic_inputs: result: Any - Result from a child operation (success, data, message)
semantic_outputs: output: Any - JSON with success, data, message

call_inputs.name: result
call_inputs.description: Result from a child operation (success, data, message)

dataflow_edges.note: Parent passes raw input to parse command
Parsed command returned to parent for routing
Parsed data returned to parent for routing
Parent passes data to register patient
Parent passes data to book appointment
Parent passes data to get records
Parent passes data to update profile
Parent passes child result to format response

interface_audit.identity_preservation_detail: All 7 child names and order are preserved exactly as provided in Stage 1 decomposition.
interface_audit.semantic_preservation_detail: All Stage 1 fields (purpose, behavior, boundary, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) are copied verbatim without modification.
interface_audit.call_signature_detail: Each signature contains only call_inputs parameters. For example, RegisterPatient signature uses only 'input' from call_inputs, not internal resources like 'patients'.
interface_audit.internal_leaf_separation_detail: Resources like 'patients' and 'appointments' are listed under internal_leaf_accesses, not call_inputs, because they are accessed internally by the child's implementation, not passed by the parent.
interface_audit.dataflow_schema_detail: All dataflow edges use valid from_node/to_node values: either 'parent' or exact child names (e.g., 'ParseCommand', 'RegisterPatient'). No resource names like 'patients' or 'appointments' appear as endpoints.
